event: extensive necrotic lesion in the M. palatoglossus, soft palate, uvula and right tonsil
histopathologic findings showed nonspecific chronic diffuse inflammation infiltrated by necrotic areas and numerous bacteria
concluded that this was a noma-like lesion
received antibiotic therapy using ceftazidime, amicacin, vancomycin, fluconazole and penicillin G
treated in the intensive care unit
total recovery albeit with extensive loss of soft palate tissue
